name: Tabs
description: AI-native revenue automation platform for B2B contract-to-cash, billing workflows, and revenue recognition schedules.

seo.title: Tabs — Subscription Billing
seo.meta_description: Tabs: AI-native revenue automation platform for B2B contract-to-cash, billing workflows, and revenue recognition schedules.

when_to_use: AI-native contract-to-cash automation for B2B SaaS billing
Revenue recognition scheduling tied to B2B contract terms
Automating collections workflows from complex SaaS contracts

pros: AI parses contracts into billing and rev rec schedules
Handles messy real-world B2B contract terms
Good fit for complex negotiated SaaS deals
cons: AI extraction still requires human review on edge cases
Young vendor with limited public track record
Not meant for high-volume self-serve billing
review.verdict: Compelling AI approach to contract-to-cash for B2B SaaS; still unproven at true enterprise scale.
review.best_for: B2B SaaS with heavy custom contracts wanting to automate billing and rev rec from PDFs.
review.not_for: Self-serve consumer SaaS or teams needing a battle-tested enterprise reference list.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales — no explicit peak-lock evidence
